title: Fédération des Caisses Desjardins du Québec completes GBP£500M covered bond offering
content:
## Fédération des Caisses Desjardins du Québec completes GBP£500M covered bond offering
On December 2, 2025, Fédération des Caisses Desjardins du Québec (“FCDQ ”) completed its GBP£500 million covered bond offering. The offering consisted of 5-year Series CBL32 GBP floating rate covered bonds due December 2, 2030.
McCarthy Tétrault LLP advised FCDQ with a team led by Marc MacMullin that included Sonia Struthers, Candace Pallone (Financial Services), Tina Benson, Tamas Toezser, Jonathan Leung, Meghan Zhang, and Antoine Lebrun (Business).
